alt.en: A bright blue-and-white surreal 3D creative studio with a computer workstation
alt.zh-CN: 蓝白色超现实 3D 创作工作室与电脑工作台

about.focusIntro: Every topic should end in a running demo, a clear note, or an honest postmortem.
about.focusTitle: From Blueprint prototypes to maintainable gameplay systems
about.label: 01 / ABOUT
about.statement: At this stage I am not collecting projects for volume. I am building focused, reproducible work that clearly explains the design and technical trade-offs behind it.
about.title: Make it playable first. Then make it better.

contact.footerNote: Studying in Jiangxi, exploring through game worlds.
contact.introduction: I would love to talk about Unreal Engine, game jams, student projects, and game development internships.
contact.label: 04 / CONTACT
contact.title: Let us build something playable.

hero.availability: Open to game jams, collaboration, and internships
hero.headline: Turning ideas into worlds you can play.
hero.introduction: I am a soon-to-be junior focused on game development. I prototype quickly with Blueprints while progressing into C++, Gameplay Framework, AI, animation, and optimization.

projects.summary: Practicing level assembly, materials, lighting, character movement, and basic interactions while documenting visual and performance trade-offs.
projects.title: UE5 Environment & Interaction Study

projects.summary: A focused 5-10 minute prototype built around one core mechanic, covering input, state, UI, and the Gameplay Framework.
projects.title: Gameplay Mechanic Prototype

projects.summary: Bilingual notes on problems, implementations, profiling data, and postmortems so every study leaves reproducible evidence.
projects.title: Development Logs & Technical Breakdowns

roadmap.introduction: Progress is measured by playable outcomes, public documentation, and real feedback - not by the number of tutorials completed.
roadmap.label: 03 / ROADMAP

outcomes: A 5-10 minute playable demo
Rebuild one Blueprint feature in C++
Git + LFS, README, and four devlogs
stages.summary: Finish a small prototype that can be played from beginning to end.
stages.title: Build the UE5 foundation

outcomes: A 10-20 minute vertical slice
AI, animation state, and feedback systems
Two game jams with postmortems
stages.summary: Bring systems, presentation, and performance into one playable experience.
stages.title: Complete a vertical slice

outcomes: One public team demo
Flagship project, video, and breakdown
Bilingual resume, mock interviews, and targeted applications
stages.summary: Show that I can collaborate, ship, and explain my own contribution.
stages.title: Team delivery & internship prep

outcomes: Two to three curated projects
Ten playtesters and two feedback iterations
Aligned portfolio, GitHub, resume, and demo reel
stages.summary: Use a few strong projects to show complete development ability and growth.
stages.title: Create a job-ready portfolio

roadmap.title: A practical path from now to graduation.

seo.description: Jiaxuan Yi bilingual game development portfolio, documenting Unreal Engine 5 studies, gameplay prototypes, devlogs, and a practical growth roadmap.
seo.title: Jiaxuan Yi - Game Development & Unreal Engine Portfolio

work.introduction: Nothing here pretends to be a finished commercial project. Every slot maps to a real learning goal and can expand into a full case study later.
work.label: 02 / LEARNING & WORK
work.openSlotMeta: Ready for a game jam, team project, or focused technical demo
work.openSlotText: The data structure is ready. Add a title, status, summary, tags, and screenshots to publish another case study.
work.title: The portfolio will grow with the skills.

about.focusIntro: 每一个学习主题都要落到一个可运行的 Demo、一次记录或一次复盘。
about.focusTitle: 从 Blueprint 原型到可维护的 Gameplay 系统
about.label: 01 / 关于我
about.statement: 现阶段我不追求堆砌项目，而是持续完成可玩、可复现、能清楚说明设计与技术取舍的小型作品。
about.title: 先做出可玩的东西，再让它变得更好。

contact.footerNote: 在江西学习，在游戏世界里持续探索。
contact.introduction: 欢迎交流 Unreal Engine、Game Jam、学生项目与游戏开发实习机会。
contact.label: 04 / 保持联系
contact.title: 一起做点好玩的。

hero.availability: 期待 Game Jam、协作与实习机会
hero.eyebrow: 江西师范大学 / 游戏开发
hero.headline: 正在把想法做成可以玩的世界。
hero.introduction: 即将进入大三，专注游戏开发。我用 Blueprint 快速验证玩法，并逐步深入 C++、Gameplay Framework、AI、动画与性能优化。
hero.role: 游戏开发者 / Unreal Engine 5 学习中

projects.summary: 练习关卡搭建、材质、灯光、角色移动与基础交互，并记录每次迭代中的视觉与性能取舍。
projects.title: UE5 场景与交互习作

projects.summary: 围绕一个核心机制制作 5-10 分钟可玩原型，覆盖输入、状态、UI 与 Gameplay Framework。
projects.title: 游戏机制原型

projects.summary: 用中英文记录问题、实现方案、性能数据与复盘，让每次学习都留下可复现的证据。
projects.title: 开发日志与技术拆解

roadmap.introduction: 路线以可玩成果、公开记录和真实反馈为衡量标准，而不是只统计学过多少教程。
roadmap.label: 03 / 发展路线

outcomes: 5-10 分钟可玩 Demo
用 C++ 重构一个 Blueprint 功能
Git + LFS、README 与 4 篇开发记录
stages.summary: 完成第一个可以从头到尾运行的小型原型。
stages.title: 打牢 UE5 基础

outcomes: 10-20 分钟 Vertical Slice
AI、动画状态机与反馈系统
2 次 Game Jam 与项目复盘
stages.summary: 把系统、表现和性能放进同一个可玩的体验里。
stages.title: 完成玩法切片

outcomes: 1 个公开团队 Demo
代表作、演示视频与技术拆解
双语简历、模拟面试与定向投递
stages.summary: 证明自己能协作、交付，并清楚解释个人贡献。
stages.title: 团队项目与实习准备

outcomes: 2-3 个精选项目
至少 10 名玩家测试与两轮迭代
统一作品集、GitHub、简历与 Demo Reel
stages.summary: 用少而强的项目展现完整的开发能力与成长轨迹。
stages.title: 形成求职作品集

roadmap.title: 从现在到毕业，我会这样推进。

seo.description: 易嘉轩的中英双语游戏开发作品集，记录 Unreal Engine 5 学习、玩法原型、开发日志与成长路线。
seo.title: 易嘉轩 - 游戏开发与 Unreal Engine 学习作品集

work.introduction: 这里不包装不存在的成品。每个位置都对应一个明确的学习目标，并能在未来直接扩展为完整案例页。
work.label: 02 / 学习与作品
work.openSlotMeta: 可扩展为 Game Jam、团队项目或技术专项 Demo
work.openSlotText: 数据结构已经预留。新增项目时只需补充标题、状态、说明、标签与截图。
work.title: 作品会随着能力一起长大。

alt.zh-CN: 平静水面上的极简 3D 热带小岛与棕榈树

alt.zh-CN: 手在明亮白色空间中伸向米黄色游戏手柄

alt.zh-CN: 明亮现代办公室中打开代码编辑器的笔记本电脑
